sentences.arabic: كَانَ الرَّجُلُ الْعَجُوزُ يَعْمَلُ فِي تَجْلِيدِ الْكُتُبِ مُنْذُ خَمْسِينَ سَنَةً.
sentences.translation: Starac je radio u uvezivanju knjiga već pedeset godina.
sentences.translationEn: The old man had been working as a bookbinder for fifty years.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَهُ يَوْمًا كِتَابٌ قَدِيمٌ تَمَزَّقَتْ صَفَحَاتُهُ وَاحْتَرَقَتْ أَطْرَافُهُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana donesena mu je stara knjiga s poderanim stranicama i spaljenim rubovima.
sentences.translationEn: One day a very old book arrived with torn pages and scorched edges.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ بِصَبْرٍ وَحُبٍّ لِأُسَابِيعَ حَتَّى أَصْلَحَ كُلَّ صَفْحَةٍ بِيَدَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Radio je strpljivo i s ljubavlju tjednima dok nije popravio svaku stranicu vlastitim rukama.
sentences.translationEn: He worked with patience and love for weeks until he had repaired every page by hand.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَعَادَ الْكِتَابَ إِلَى صَاحِبِهِ، بَكَى الرَّجُلُ مِنَ الْفَرَحِ لِأَنَّهُ كِتَابُ جَدِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Kad je vratio knjigu vlasniku, čovjek je zaплakao od radosti jer je to bila knjiga njegovog djeda.
sentences.translationEn: When he returned the book to its owner, the man wept with joy — it had been his grandfather's book.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُجَلِّدُ الْعَجُوزُ: «لَيْسَ عَمَلِي تَجْلِيدُ الْوَرَقِ، بَلْ حِفْظُ الذَّاكِرَةِ الَّتِي بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ.»
sentences.translation: Stari uvezivač je rekao: „Moj posao nije uvezivanje papira — već čuvanje sjećanja koja mi se predaju u ruke."
sentences.translationEn: The old bookbinder said: "My work is not binding paper — it is preserving the memories that are placed in my hands."
